title: South Korean Company YPP Plans to Invest up to $3.1 Billion in Green Hydrogen Production in Kazakhstan
content: Azamat Kozhanov, Deputy Chairman of the Management Board of JSC â€œNC â€œKAZAKH INVEST,â€ held a meeting with John M. Bek, Chairman of the Board of the South Korean engineering company YPP Corporation. During the meeting, the parties signed a framework agreement on cooperation for the implementation of a green hydrogen production project in Kazakhstan. The parties confirmed their intent to implement a major investment project â€” Green Energy Complex â€” in the Republic of Kazakhstan, aimed at creating a full-cycle production of green hydrogen and ammonia using renewable energy sources (RES).
author: Analysts Account
